title: Premium Japan Cherry Blossom & Heritage
highlights: Hike around the base of majestic Mount Fuji & Lake Ashi cruise
Ride the legendary Shinkansen Bullet Train from Tokyo to Kyoto
Explore Tokyo's modern districts alongside historic Sensoji Temple
Visit Fushimi Inari Shrine and Arashiyama Bamboo Grove in Kyoto

itinerary.title: Arrival in Tokyo & VIP Hotel Transfer
itinerary.description: Land at Narita International Airport. Meet your coordinator and transfer via private coach to your hotel in central Tokyo. Rest of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Tokyo Landmark City Tour
itinerary.description: Explore the historic Asakusa district and Sensoji Temple. Walk through Harajuku, visit Meiji Shrine, and cross the world-famous Shibuya Crossing.

itinerary.title: Mount Fuji & Hakone Lake Cruise
itinerary.description: Drive to Mt. Fuji 5th Station. Enjoy panoramic views of the peak. Board a scenic cruise on Lake Ashi and ride the Komagatake Ropeway.

itinerary.title: Kyoto Bullet Train Transition
itinerary.description: Board the high-speed Shinkansen Bullet Train to Kyoto. Upon arrival, visit the glittering Kinkakuji Temple (Golden Pavilion) and check into your hotel.

itinerary.title: Kyoto Shrines & Bamboo Grove Chronicle
itinerary.description: Walk through the thousand red torii gates at Fushimi Inari Shrine. In the afternoon, wander the towering Arashiyama Bamboo Grove.

itinerary.title: Return to Tokyo & Shinjuku Nightlife Tour
itinerary.description: Travel back to Tokyo. In the evening, take a guided walking tour of Shinjuku's neon alleyways, metropolitan building observation decks, and shopping hubs.

itinerary.title: Tokyo Departure to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Enjoy final souvenir shopping in Ginza before your afternoon transfer to Narita Airport for your flight back to Kathmandu.

title: Imperial China & Great Wall Discovery
highlights: Walk the historic Mutianyu section of the Great Wall of China
Visit the Forbidden City and Tiananmen Square in Beijing
Explore the beautiful imperial gardens of the Summer Palace
Experience shopping and street food in Beijing's Wangfujing

itinerary.title: Arrival in Beijing & Welcome Dinner
itinerary.description: Welcome to Beijing. Private airport pickup and transfer to your luxury hotel. Enjoy a welcome dinner featuring traditional Peking Roast Duck.

itinerary.title: Tiananmen Square & Forbidden City
itinerary.description: Begin the day at the massive Tiananmen Square. Pass through the Meridian Gate to explore the imperial courtyards of the Forbidden City.

itinerary.title: The Great Wall Ascent
itinerary.description: Travel to the Mutianyu section of the Great Wall. Take a cable car to the battlements and walk the historic wall. Cable car or toboggan down.

itinerary.title: Summer Palace & Temple of Heaven
itinerary.description: Visit the majestic Summer Palace overlooking Kunming Lake. Continue to the Temple of Heaven where emperors prayed for bountiful harvests.

itinerary.title: Hutong Rickshaw Tour & Modern Beijing
itinerary.description: Take a rickshaw tour through Beijing's ancient narrow alleyways (Hutongs). Later, drive past the Olympic Bird's Nest stadium.

itinerary.title: Beijing Departure to Kathmandu
itinerary.description: Morning free for shopping at the Silk Market. Private transfer to Beijing Capital Airport for your return flight.

title: Tropical Bali Island Scenic Gateway
highlights: Visit historic Ubud Monkey Forest and art galleries
Watch the stunning sunset over Uluwatu Temple cliffs
Cross to Tanah Lot Temple surrounded by ocean waves
Explore the white sand beaches of Kuta and Seminyak
inclusions: Roundtrip Flight Tickets via Kuala Lumpur

itinerary.title: Arrival in Denpasar & Beachfront check-in
itinerary.description: Arrive in Denpasar, Bali. VIP welcome and private transfer to your beachfront resort in Kuta/Seminyak. Relax by the pool.

itinerary.title: Ubud Culture & Sacred Monkey Forest
itinerary.description: Drive to Ubud, the cultural heart of Bali. Visit the Sacred Monkey Forest, Tegalalang Rice Terraces, and the traditional Ubud Art Market.

itinerary.title: Kintamani Volcano & Holy Spring Water
itinerary.description: Enjoy spectacular views of Mt. Batur volcano and lake. Visit Tirta Empul holy spring water temple for a purification ritual experience.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot & Uluwatu Temple Sunset Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the iconic offshore temple Tanah Lot. Later, head to Uluwatu Temple perched on a high cliff, and watch the traditional Kecak Fire Dance.

itinerary.title: Water Sports & Departure Transfer
itinerary.description: Spend the morning at Tanjung Benoa for water sports (parasailing/banana boat). In the afternoon, transfer to the airport for your flight back.

title: Vibrant Bangkok & Pattaya Explorer
highlights: Explore the golden temples Wat Pho and Wat Arun in Bangkok
Speed boat tour to Coral Island (Koh Larn) in Pattaya
Enjoy a scenic dinner cruise on the Chao Phraya River
Guided tour of Safari World & Marine Park
inclusions: Daily Buffet Breakfasts & Coral Island Lunch

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bangkok & Pattaya Transfer
itinerary.description: Land in Bangkok (Suvarnabhumi Airport). Private transfer directly to the beachside town of Pattaya. Check into your hotel.

itinerary.title: Coral Island Speed Boat Excursion
itinerary.description: Board a speed boat to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Enjoy water sports (parasailing/undersea walk) and a delicious beachside lunch. Back to Pattaya.

itinerary.title: Nong Nooch Garden & Bangkok Return
itinerary.description: Visit Nong Nooch Botanical Garden to see orchid collections and cultural shows. Drive back to Bangkok. Take a evening dinner cruise.

itinerary.title: Bangkok Golden Temples & Safari World
itinerary.description: Visit Wat Pho (Temple of Reclining Buddha) and Wat Arun (Temple of Dawn). Spend the afternoon at Safari World & Marine Park.

itinerary.title: Market Shopping & Departure
itinerary.description: Free time for shopping at Platinum Mall or MBK Center. Transfer to Suvarnabhumi Airport for your return flight to Kathmandu.
